# Writeup: Binary Gauntlet 0

This binary had a simple binary overflow vulnerability. My first instinct was to overflow the input to see if I could get the flag without dissassembling the binary. This turned out to be correct course of action because as you can see below I was able to get the flag.

```
    AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
    

    dc42ef4afcf1c2d58c67c90679ac8041
```
